visualGoal: Make a Star Citizen / Elite pilot feel the VKB ladder as a set of optional, well-triggered steps rather than an inevitable climb. Real VKB product proof at every rung, plus the mount + macro-panel setup tax, so the buyer sees the true cost. No procedural art; every embedded image is a verified in-house product photo.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Editorial 16:9 cover: a clean dark sim cockpit desk at cool blue rim light, staged as four ascending 'rungs' left to right with empty product-overlay plinths for real VKB hardware photos (Gladiator stick, Omni-Throttle, Gunfighter base, MCG grip), a subtle glowing step-line connecting them, curator Val Chen in soft focus at the desk edge gesturing up the ladder, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fabricated joystick shapes, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: The VKB ladder: 4 rungs, 4 triggers
content: Step 1 Gladiator NXT EVO pair (~$240-280) — trigger: you want a real magnetic-sensor HOSAS
Step 2 Omni-Throttle (~$149) — trigger: analog off-hand thrust that holds position
Step 3 Gunfighter Mk.IV base (~$289) — trigger: you can name what you dislike about the Gladiator's cam feel
Step 4 MCG Pro grip (~$136) — trigger: you want VKB's flagship combat grip
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center numbered ladder, large readable text, space-blue palette, real VKB product photos as rung markers for Codex overlay, prices tagged 'check current'

infographicPrompts.title: Gladiator vs Gunfighter Mk.IV: the feel difference
content: Gladiator: fiberglass-infused pincer gimbal, fixed cams, 1 spring per axis
Gunfighter Mk.IV: all-metal cam gimbal, 2 springs per cam, 4 spring sets
Gunfighter cam profiles: Avia Hard / Avia Soft / Space Hard / Space Soft
Grips: Rev.C round gold-plated connector, 5 interchangeable grips
Note: a Gladiator grip does NOT mount on a Gunfighter base
infographicPrompts.style: Two-column comparison card, space-blue vs gold accent, VKB base photos as column headers for Codex overlay

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a tidy twin-stick HOSAS desk, one hand resting on a mounted joystick, calm honest-broker expression as if saying 'most of you should stop here', product-overlay space beside the sticks, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait, cool blue key light.

openQuestions: Confirm exact current US MSRP for Gladiator Std/Prem, Omni-Throttle, Gunfighter Mk.IV base, and MCG Pro/Ultimate — VKB Shopify US store is JS-rendered and did not expose live prices to server fetch; all quoted figures are approximate and flagged 'check current'.
Confirm the precise Rev.C grip-interchange story with VKB (which 5 grips; any adapter path from Gladiator-era grips) before certification — article currently states the conservative version.
Re-verify stock/availability language at certification time; multiple SKUs were on back-in-stock notify.
